reviews.comment:
Muy muy mala la atencion me coliciono una iveco los que atienden los expendedores de Combustible se toman el tiempo hasta clarlan con sus amigos... Para ser atendido tuve que esperar 35 minutos NO RECOMIENDO ESTA ESTACION DE *SERVICIO...

(Translated by Google)
Very, very bad service. I was hit by an Iveco. The people who serve at the fuel pumps take their time, even talking to their friends... I had to wait 35 minutes to be served. I DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS SERVICE STATION...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnd2FxN2pBRRAB

reviews.comment:
